subcodes.first_line: O pure soul! Truth is a precious gem that hath remained hidden and concealed within the shell of contingent being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جان پاک حقیقت گوهر گرانبهاایست که در صدف امکان مهجور و مستور مانده و مخفی
subcodes.subjects: @being a source of light; guidance, @call to action, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @living waters; water of life
